name: Persimmon Orange Delights
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar lightly.
2. Add eggs, persimmon pulp, orange rind, and orange juice to the creamed mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, measure flour and stir in baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, mace or cloves, salt, nuts, and raisins.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients once together.
5. For Drop cookies: Drop teaspoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 15 minutes.
6. For Persimmon Brownies: Pour batter into a 13 x 9 inch greased pan. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 30 minutes or until the brownies begin to pull away from the sides of the pan. Cut into squares and serve with ice cream or sweetened whipped cream sprinkled with grated orange rind.
Makes 3 dozen drop cookies or 12 persimmon brownies.
